title: Classic Polish Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf dish that's perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Heat the bacon fat in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped festive onions and cook until they're translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the peeled and diced juicy carrots and cook for another 3-4 minutes.
Add the mixed pilaf rice, water, and grain of salt to the saucepan. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
